content:
Close To You - Maxi Preist

Enjoy!
Adrian R



[Chords]

[tab]Ebm7    x-6-8-6-7-6
G#m7    4-6-4-4-4-4
Bbm7    6-8-6-6-6-6
B       7-9-9-8-7-x
C#      9-11-11-10-9-x[/tab]



[Intro]

[ch]Ebm7[/ch]  -  [ch]Ebm7[/ch]  -  [ch]G#m7[/ch]  -  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]    x2



[Verse]

[tab]          [ch]Ebm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]G#m7[/ch]
Telling me lies when the truth was clear[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bbm7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]

[tab]  [ch]G#m7[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
